fields.name: Job Queue Entries Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of job queue entries that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: User Posting Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period number of the documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: No. Series Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period number of the number series for the documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: CDS Integration Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors related to data integration.

fields.name: Coupled Data Synch Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred in the latest synchronization of coupled data between Business Central and Dynamics 365 Sales.
